please rewrite this Dears,

Dear Team,

Please be informed that Israa will be assuming the role of Senior Social Worker. As a result, she will be utilizing Rania's email address.

could please write more and be more professional as the sender  from HR

Subject: Update: Israa's New Position as Senior Social Worker

Dear Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inform you about an important update regarding the responsibilities and email usage within our department.

We are pleased to announce that Israa will be transitioning into the role of Senior Social Worker, effective immediately. With her extensive experience and proven expertise in the field, we are confident that Israa will excel in this new position and continue to make valuable contributions to our team.

In light of this change, Israa will be utilizing Rania's email address as her primary means of communication. Going forward, please direct any work-related correspondence, queries, or requests to Israa at [Rania's Email Address]. This step will ensure a smooth continuation of communication channels and allow for seamless coordination within our department.

We kindly request your support and understanding during this transition period. If you have any questions or require further clarification, please feel free to reach out to me directly or to the HR department.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. We have every confidence that Israa will thrive in her new role and contribute significantly to our organization's mission and objectives.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Human Resources [Your Company Name]
please write the above in short and professional

Subject: Israa's New Role and Email Change

Dear Team,

I am writing to inform you that Israa will be assuming the position of Senior Social Worker. Effective immediately, she will be using Rania's email address for all work-related communication.

Please direct any future correspondence, queries, or requests to Israa at [Rania's Email Address]. This change ensures a seamless transition and smooth coordination within our department.

Should you have any questions or need further clarification, feel free to reach out to me or the HR department directly.

Thank you for your cooperation and support during this transition.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Human Resources [Your Company Name]
please write the above email in different way

Subject: Important Announcement: Israa Appointed as Senior Social Worker

Dear Team,

I hope this email finds you all in good spirits. I am delighted to share some exciting news regarding our department's staffing update.

It gives me great pleasure to announce that Israa has been appointed to the critical role of Senior Social Worker. With her wealth of experience and exceptional skills, she is poised to make a significant impact in this position.

To streamline our communication processes, Israa will be transitioning to use Rania's email address for all official correspondence. This change will ensure a seamless flow of communication within our department and facilitate efficient coordination.

Going forward, please direct any work-related emails, queries, or requests to Israa using the following email address: [Rania's Email Address]. We kindly request your cooperation in updating your contact records accordingly.

As we undergo this smooth transition, we look forward to your continued support and engagement. Should you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to either myself or the HR department.

Congratulations to Israa on her new role, and we have no doubt that she will thrive and deliver outstanding results as our Senior Social Worker.

Thank you for your attention and cooperation.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Human Resources [Your Company Name]

Subject: Update: Israa as Senior Social Worker & Email Change

Dear Team,

I wanted to let you know that Israa will now be serving as our Senior Social Worker. Therefore, she will be using Rania's email address for all official communications.

Please update your records to reflect this change and direct any future work-related emails, queries, or requests to Israa at [Rania's Email Address].

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to contact me or the HR department.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation in this matter.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
HR [Your Company Name]

Subject: Announcement: Israa's Promotion to Senior Social Worker & Email Update

Dear Team,

I'm pleased to share the exciting news that Israa has been promoted to the role of Senior Social Worker. As part of this transition, she will now be using Rania's email address for all official communication.

To ensure seamless coordination, please update your contact information and direct any future work-related emails, queries, or requests to Israa at [Rania's Email Address].

We appreciate your support and cooperation during this change. Should you have any inquiries or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to me or the HR department.

Congratulations to Israa on this well-deserved promotion! We have no doubt that she will excel in her new position.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
HR [Your Company Name]
other option can we use instead of appointed

Subject: Update: Israa Assumes New Role as Senior Social Worker & Email Change

Dear Team,

I wanted to inform you of an important update regarding Israa's role within our department. We are thrilled to announce that Israa will now be taking on the position of Senior Social Worker. As a result, she will be using Rania's email address for all official correspondence.

Kindly adjust your contact information accordingly and direct any future work-related emails, queries, or requests to Israa at [Rania's Email Address].

We appreciate your cooperation and support during this transition. If you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me or the HR department.

We congratulate Israa on her new responsibilities and expect great things from her in this elevated role.

Thank you for your attention.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR [Your Company Name]
